top_findings.summary: The skill recommends and instructs the use of `--cookies-from-browser` to access browser cookies (from Chrome, Firefox, etc.) for downloading YouTube videos. While this is a functional workaround for 403 errors, accessing browser cookies exposes sensitive authentication data (login sessions, browsing history) unrelated to the core purpose of video downloading. This constitutes permission overreach, as the skill could function without this access (albeit less reliably) or should require explicit, separate user consent for cookie access rather than embedding it as a standard command.
